task_completion.description: Create the four required sheets for the DCF model.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bottom tab bar in the spreadsheet application shows tabs named 'Assumptions', 'Projections', 'FCF', and 'DCF'.

task_completion.description: Derive operating margins and list projection assumptions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Assumptions sheet contains percentages derived from Year 3, such as 29% (COGS), 23% (S&M), 17% (R&D), 8.5% (G&A), 4% (D&A), along with projection assumptions like 20% (Revenue Growth) and 25% (Tax Rate).

task_completion.description: Project the Income Statement for Years 4 through 8.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Projections sheet shows columns for Years 4 to 8. Year 4 Revenue should be approximately $9,172,800 and Year 8 Revenue approximately $19,020,718.

task_completion.description: Compute annual Unlevered Free Cash Flow for Years 4 through 8.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FCF sheet shows calculations for Unlevered Free Cash Flow. Year 4 FCF should be approximately $1.05M to $1.06M, and Year 8 FCF approximately $2.18M to $2.19M.

task_completion.description: Calculate Present Value, Terminal Value, and Enterprise Value.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The DCF sheet shows a WACC of 10.5%, Terminal Growth Rate of 2.5%, Terminal Value around $28M, and an Enterprise Value prominently displayed around $22.7M (acceptable range $17M-$32M).

task_completion.description: Save the workbook with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title bar of the spreadsheet application shows the filename 'novapeak_dcf_model.xlsx' or 'novapeak_dcf_model'.

integrity.description: The agent used the spreadsheet application GUI to build the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with a spreadsheet program (like LibreOffice Calc) rather than just running a terminal script to generate the file.

integrity.description: The agent built a genuine financial model.
integrity.visual_evidence: The spreadsheet shows a structured model with rows, columns, and headers properly utilized, rather than just a single cell with the final answer pasted in.

integrity.description: The agent used the provided historical data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The model is based on the correct Year 3 revenue of $7,644,000, without hallucinating different starting numbers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Year 3 operating margins: COGS 29.0%, Sales & Marketing 23.0%, R&D 17.0%, G&A 8.5%, D&A 4.0%. Projected Revenue: Year 4 ~$9.17M, Year 8 ~$19.02M. Projected FCF: Year 4 ~$1.06M, Year 8 ~$2.19M. Terminal Value: ~$28.0M. Enterprise Value: ~$22.7M (acceptable range $17M-$32M). WACC: 10.5%. Terminal Growth: 2.5%. Tax Rate: 25%.
